name: Aaron Sachs
abstract: Aaron Sachs (July 4, 1923 – June 5, 2014) was an American jazz saxophone and clarinet player.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Charlie Parker Memorial Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Bert
about_quotes.evidence: So it was a great band... Aaron Sachs, Shorty Rodgers, Clyde Lombardi, Specs Powell and Hank Cohoot on piano.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Bert interviewed by Monk Rowe, Danbury, Connecticut, November 20, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Coleman
about_quotes.evidence: Red Norvo had an orchestra composed of Joe (Flip) Phillips, Shorty Rodgers, Aaron Sachs, Eddie Bert, Remo Palmieri, Teddy Wilson and Slam Stewart.

about_quotes.speaker: Jonah Jones
about_quotes.evidence: They left, so we got Aaron Sachs in his place and we got Osie Johnson in Art's place.
